extDescription.message: Right-click to capture screen and translate with Easydict OCR

setupDescription.message: This extension requires the Easydict for Windows desktop app.

setupInstallStep1.message: Install Easydict from the Microsoft Store

setupInstallStep2.message: Launch the app, right-click the system tray icon, and enable Browser Support

setupNotRunning.message: The Easydict app is not running. Please start it and try again.
setupNotRunning.description: Message when native host exists but app is not running

setupRetrySuccess.message: Connected successfully! This tab will close shortly.

setupRetryFailed.message: Still unable to connect. Please check that the app is installed and Browser Support is enabled.
setupRetryFailed.description: Status message when retry fails (native host not found)

setupRetryAppNotRunning.message: The app was found but is not responding. Please make sure Easydict is running.
setupRetryAppNotRunning.description: Status message when retry finds host but app not running

contextMenuKissSetup.description: Context menu item that opens the KISS setup helper page

kissSetupHeading.description: Heading on the KISS setup helper page

kissSetupDescription.message: Reuse Easydict's already-configured translation services from inside KISS Translator. Copy the values below into KISS → Settings → Custom Interface.
kissSetupDescription.description: Subheading describing what the KISS setup helper does

kissSetupStep1.message: Open Easydict desktop app → Settings → Local API & Integrations

kissSetupStep2.message: Enable the local API server and copy the endpoint URL and API key

kissSetupStep3.message: Paste them below, then open KISS Translator options and create a new Custom Interface using the values

kissSetupEndpointLabel.description: Label for the endpoint URL field

kissSetupTokenLabel.description: Label for the API key field

kissSetupHookLabel.description: Label for the request hook code field

kissSetupCopied.description: Transient label shown after a successful copy

kissSetupOpenEasydict.description: Button that opens the Easydict desktop Local API settings tab via deep link

kissSetupOpenKiss.description: Button that opens the KISS Translator options page
